patches.summary: Map common German proctologist terms to Doctolib's proktologie specialty slug.
patches.reason: Doctolib does not serve /proktologe/<city> search pages, while /proktologie/<city> has the expected keyword metadata and provider results.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; live proktologe Berlin search returned Dr. med. Paul Bogen with first slot 2026-05-18T11:30:00.000+02:00.
